title: Her Cardboard Lover
writer: Jacques Deval, Valerie Wyngate, P.G. Wodehouse
actors: Norma Shearer, Robert Taylor, George Sanders
plot: A wealthy woman, trying to discourage a former boyfriend from pursuing her, hires a young songwriter who needs money to pay off his gambling debts to pretend to be her boyfriend. The problem is that the phony boyfriend is really i...
